ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicle_performance" (
  "line_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the vehicle or line */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of vehicle or line */,
  "val" INTEGER /* Value representing a specific metric (e.g., speed, load) */,
  "sum_delay" INTEGER /* Total delay experienced by the vehicle */,
  "avg_delay" INTEGER /* Average delay experienced by the vehicle */,
  "rcvd_dt_tm" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was received */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Current latitude of the vehicle */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Current longitude of the vehicle */,
  "speed" REAL /* Current speed of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_level" REAL /* Current fuel level of the vehicle */,
  "load_weight" REAL /* Current weight of the load */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status (e.g., in good condition, requires inspection) */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the vehicle is on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id", "rcvd_dt_tm"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_performance_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_performance_sum_delay FOREIGN KEY ("sum_delay") REFERENCES delay_reasons ("delay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "line_id" TEXT /* Reference to the line or route the vehicle is assigned to */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle (e.g., truck, train, ship) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was registered into the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., active, maintenance, retired) */,
  "make" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Maximum load capacity of the vehicle */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner or operator of the vehicle (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Starting location of the route */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* Ending location of the route */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the route in kilometers */,
  "estimated_time" TEXT /* Estimated travel time for the route */,
  "max_speed_limit" REAL /* Maximum speed limit on the route */,
  "min_speed_limit" REAL /* Minimum speed limit on the route */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the route information was updated */,
  "route_status" TEXT /* Current status of the route (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_routes" (
  "vehicle_route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle-route assignment */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was assigned to the route */,
  "expected_arrival" TEXT /* Expected arrival time at the destination */,
  "actual_arrival" TEXT /* Actual arrival time at the destination */,
  "delay_minutes" INTEGER /* Total delay in minutes */,
  "route_status" TEXT /* Status of the route assignment (e.g., active, completed, delayed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_routes_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "metric_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric (e.g., maximum speed, minimum fuel level) */,
  "metric_unit_type" TEXT /* Type of unit (e.g., distance, time, weight) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delay_reasons" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay reason */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the delay reason */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the delay (e.g., minor, major, critical) */,
  "recommended_action" TEXT /* Recommended action to mitigate the delay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., dispatcher, planner, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "line_id" TEXT /* ID of the vehicle or line being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES vehicle_performance ("line_id")
)
